rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 21, 2008 LINE 1. rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. MIKHAIL TRUBIN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 21, 2008 LINE 5. CROSS-DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CROSS-C0MPLAINANT DOES NOT OPPOSE THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. THE THIRD THROUGH SIXTH CAUSES ARE BARRED BY FAILURE TO FILE A GOVERNMENT CLAIM. IN THE THIRD THROUGH FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION, CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS SEEKING AFFIRMATIVE RELIEF BASED ON EVENTS THAT ARE SEPARATE AND DISTINCT FROM THE AUTO ACCIDENT. THE CLAIMS ALSO BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. IN THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION, CROSS-COMPLAINANT HAS NOT AND CANNOT ALLEGE NEGLIGENCE ON HIS PART IN HIS DEALINGS WITH THE CROSS-DEFENDANTS. THERE IS NO BASIS FOR AN EQUITABLE INDEMNITY CLAIM. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: FLORO G ASUNCION VS. UNION CAB COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 21, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANTS LAM TU AND JOHN NGUYEN'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED A DERIVATIVE CLAIM AND THE OTHER GROUNDS ARE WITHOUT MERIT. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: FLORO G ASUNCION VS. UNION CAB COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 21, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANTS LAM TU AND JOHN NGUYEN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD IN WHAT MANNER THE CONTRACT IS UNLAWFUL. OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. THE ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS ARE PROPERLY PLEAD. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 21, 2008 LINE 8. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS BENJAMIN KAPLAN AND THE LAW OFFICES OF KAPLAN & SAM'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 28, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE OPPOSING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)

SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 21, 2008 LINE 13. DEFENDANT RAY BRONNER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR, PER LOCAL RULE 8.2(A)(2)B, PARTIES MAY NOT NOTICE MOTIONS IN THE SAME CASE IN DIFFERENT DEPARTMENTS ON THE SAME DATE. THIS CASE IS CURRENTLY SET FOR COURT TRIAL IN DEPARTMENT 206 ON APRIL 21, 2006. =(302/PJM/VC)
